THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF TYLER ABRAHAM IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LO POST STREET LLC IS PRESENT, APPEARING IS ALIEA MARRERO. DEFENDANT RELISTO IS PRESENT, APPEARING IS JUSTYNA BARROW. THE COURT FINDS: PLAINTIFF DOSE NOT HAVE THE LEGAL STANDING TO BRING THE SUIT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MURLENE J RANDLE; CLERK: N.WEBB. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
